title: Automated Governance & Model Evaluation
summary: A security framework designed to continuously intercept production LLM tokens, assessing safety criteria against live compliance rule sets.

title: Federated Enterprise Vector Architecture
summary: A pre-packaged Infrastructure as Code template that provisions globally distributed vector collections hooked into traditional relational nodes.

title: Transforming Retail with Smart Agents
